title: It could be worse
question: 把今天课文里“丢了东西、有人理解但暂时帮不上、最后被诚实归还”的反转放进学校、酒店、商场或地铁失物招领场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的词或短语。
example_answer: I had just lost my school card, and I felt very upset. The teacher was sympathetic, but she could do nothing. Then a classmate came in with my card. There is still some honesty in this world.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 学校失物招领：我刚刚丢了饭卡，心里很烦恼
options.english_template: I had just lost my school card, and I felt very ___.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 酒店前台：工作人员很理解我，但一开始也帮不上忙
options.english_template: The hotel clerk was ___, but she could do nothing.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 同学归还：有人把不属于自己的东西送了回来
options.english_template: A classmate returned my card. There is still some ___ in this world.
